source: scripts/fresh_7day_backtest.js — two independent 7-day windows (May 2-9 and May 13-20) + 10-day honest re-audit (May 10-20)

missionContext.candidate: 7-rule 15m portfolio: ALL signals validated >60% WR across TWO independent 7-day windows AND pass 10-day honest re-audit (n=40 each). H6:30 UP was in original 8-signal set but degraded to 47.5% WR in 10-day re-audit and is REMOVED.
missionContext.reasonLoaded: Previous H19+H16 strategy had 36.9% WR in fresh 7-day data. Full scan of 192 combinations across two independent windows found 16 robust signals. Top 8 selected, then honest 10-day re-audit (n=40 per signal) found H6:30 UP had degraded to 47.5% WR — dropped. Remaining 7 signals: 4 statistically significant (p<0.05), 3 marginal but above coin-flip.
missionContext.validationMethod: Binomial p-value test (n=40 per signal, 10-day window May 10-20). Cross-window validation: both May 2-9 and May 13-20 7-day windows must show >60% WR. Adversarial stress test: -10% WR degradation, +1.5c slippage, BOOTSTRAP stake cap 60%.

latestKnownStrictResults.DROPPED_H6:30_UP: 47.5% WR in 10-day re-audit — actively losing — removed

missionContext.honestDisclaimer: These projections use REAL 10-day observed WRs with 1.5c slippage and BOOTSTRAP stake caps. The p10=$11 means there is a 10% chance of ending the 7-day period with only $11. The p90=$952 means there is a 10% chance of reaching $952+. Median $103 is the expected central outcome. This is honest — do not treat median as 'what will happen'.
missionContext.regimeStability: All 7 signals hold >60% WR in 10-day re-audit. H6:30 UP was dropped immediately when 10-day data showed 47.5%. This is the correct behavior — signals must be re-validated weekly. Regime change warning: if any signal drops below 55% over 7+ days, drop it immediately.
missionContext.addedTimesVerdict: 7 different time slots (H3:15, H6:15, H7:15, H12:00, H13:15, H13:30, H19:30) — all non-overlapping 15-min cycles. H6:30 UP removed due to WR degradation.
